---
name: Documentation
about: Report documentation issues or suggest improvements
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: 'type:docs, status:triage'
assignees: 'marcusjhanford'
---

## Documentation Issue

Describe the documentation issue or improvement you'd like to see.

## Location

Where is the documentation that needs improvement?
- File path or URL
- Section/heading
- README, CONTRIBUTING, code comments, etc.

## Current State

What does the documentation say now? (Copy the relevant text if applicable)

## Suggested Improvement

What should the documentation say? Provide your suggested text or changes.

## Why This Matters

Explain why this documentation change is important:
- Is it confusing current users?
- Is information missing?
- Is it outdated?
- Does it block contribution?

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the documentation request here.

## Checklist

- [ ] I have checked that this is not already addressed in another issue
- [ ] I have provided specific suggestions for improvement
